purpose: Gamma API health check (returns OK if service is up)
parameters: None.

purpose: List markets with rich metadata and filters (status, tags, liquidity, etc.)
parameters: Query: pagination (limit, offset), boolean flags (active, closed, archived, new), filters for categories, tags, events/series, liquidity/volume ranges, and sorting options (see docs for full list).

purpose: Get full market details by ID
parameters: Path: id (market identifier).

purpose: Get full market details by slug
parameters: Path: slug (human-readable market slug).

purpose: Get tags associated with a specific market
parameters: Path: id (market identifier). Optional query pagination (limit, offset).

purpose: List events (containers for markets) with filters
parameters: Query: pagination (limit, offset), flags for active/closed/archived/new, category and tag filters, date-range and sort options (see docs).

purpose: Get event details by ID
parameters: Path: id (event identifier).

purpose: Get event details by slug
parameters: Path: slug (event slug).

purpose: Get tags associated with a specific event
parameters: Path: id (event identifier). Optional query pagination (limit, offset).

purpose: List series (groups of related or recurring events)
parameters: Query: pagination (limit, offset), filters for active/closed/archived/new, series type/recurrence, associated categories/tags, and sorting options.

purpose: Get series details by ID
parameters: Path: id (series identifier).

purpose: List tags used for events/markets/series
parameters: Query: pagination (limit, offset), optional filters for label/slug and visibility flags.

purpose: Get details for a single tag by ID
parameters: Path: id (tag identifier).

purpose: Get related tags (tag relationships/graph) for a tag ID
parameters: Path: id (tag identifier). Optional query pagination.

purpose: List comments, optionally filtered by parent entity
parameters: Query: pagination (limit, offset), filters for the parent entity (such as event, market, or series) and sort options (see docs).

purpose: Get a single comment by comment ID
parameters: Path: id (comment identifier).

purpose: List comments authored by a given wallet address
parameters: Path: user_address (author wallet). Query: pagination (limit, offset).

purpose: Get public profile data for a wallet address
parameters: Query: wallet address (either directly or via proxy parameter, see docs).

purpose: Full-text search across markets, events, tags, and profiles
parameters: Query: search term, entity types to include, filters for status/tags/categories, and pagination (limit, offset).

purpose: Get per-sport metadata (branding, default tags/series, etc.)
parameters: Query: optional filters for sport identifiers and pagination.

purpose: List valid sports market types (spreads, totals, etc.)
parameters: None beyond optional pagination or filtering (see docs).

purpose: List sports teams metadata (league, name, logo, etc.)
parameters: Query: optional filters for league/sport and pagination (limit, offset).

purpose: Get current open positions for a user (per outcome token)
parameters: Query: user wallet identifier plus optional pagination and filtering by markets/events (see docs).

purpose: Get closed positions history for a user
parameters: Query: user wallet identifier, optional time-range and pagination filters.

purpose: Get trades for a user and/or specified markets
parameters: Query: user wallet identifier and/or market identifiers, plus pagination and sort options.

purpose: Get on-chain activity feed (trades, splits, merges, redeems, rewards, etc.)
parameters: Query: user wallet identifier and/or market identifiers, filter by activity type and time range, plus pagination.

purpose: Get top holders per outcome token for given markets
parameters: Query: one or more market or token identifiers, optional limit for number of holders returned.

purpose: Get aggregate total value of a user’s positions (optionally scoped to markets)
parameters: Query: user wallet identifier, optional list of market identifiers and currency/display options.

purpose: Get open interest metrics for markets
parameters: Query: one or more market identifiers or a scope describing which markets to include.

purpose: Get trader leaderboard rankings with volume/PnL/profile info
parameters: Query: ranking scope/timeframe, pagination, and optional filters (see docs).

purpose: Get aggregated builder leaderboard over a selected time period
parameters: Query: timeframe (e.g., daily/weekly/monthly/all-time), pagination, and optional filters for specific builders.

purpose: Get daily builder volume time-series
parameters: Query: date range/timeframe, granularity, and optional filters for specific builders.

purpose: Get current price for a given token (and side)
parameters: Query: outcome token identifier and side (buy or sell).

purpose: Batch get prices for multiple tokens/sides
parameters: JSON body: list of token identifiers and sides to price (see docs for exact schema).

purpose: Get historical price series for a traded token
parameters: Query: token identifier plus either explicit time range or a preset window and sampling interval.

purpose: Get current order book snapshot for a token (bids/asks ladders)
parameters: Query: token identifier and optional depth or aggregation parameters.

purpose: Place a single signed limit order
parameters: JSON body: order details including token identifier, side, price, size, time-in-force, and signature/auth fields.

purpose: Place multiple signed orders in a single request
parameters: JSON body: array of order objects, each with token identifier, side, price, size, TIF, and signature/auth fields.

purpose: Cancel a single order by order ID
parameters: JSON body or query parameter: order identifier for the order to cancel (see docs).

purpose: Cancel multiple orders by IDs
parameters: JSON body: list of order identifiers to cancel.

purpose: Cancel all open orders for the authenticated user
parameters: JSON body or query parameters: optional filters (e.g., by market) to scope cancellation (see docs).

purpose: Cancel all open orders for a specified market/token
parameters: JSON body or query parameters: market and/or token identifiers for which to cancel orders.

purpose: Get open orders for the authenticated user, with filters
parameters: Query: filters such as market identifiers, token identifiers, and specific order IDs, plus pagination.

purpose: Public market data stream (order book + trades) for specified token IDs
parameters: Initial JSON message: {type: 'market', assets_ids: [tokenIds], optional flags; no HTTP query parameters.

purpose: Authenticated user stream of orders and trades
parameters: Initial JSON message: includes auth fields plus markets list to subscribe to; see docs for exact payload.

purpose: Real-time crypto prices from Binance, filterable by symbols
parameters: Subscription JSON: {action: 'subscribe', subscriptions: [{topic: 'crypto_prices', type: 'update', filters: 'btcusdt,solusdt'}]}

purpose: Real-time crypto prices from Chainlink oracle feeds
parameters: Subscription JSON: same structure as crypto_prices, with topic set to 'crypto_prices_chainlink'.

purpose: Real-time comment and reaction events on Polymarket
parameters: Subscription JSON: {action: 'subscribe', subscriptions: [{topic: 'comments', type: 'comment_created', filters: '<optional filters>'}]}

purpose: Live sports game updates for all active sports events
parameters: No query parameters; on connect you start receiving JSON updates. Must respond to ping messages with pong.

purpose: List supported chains/tokens for bridging and their constraints
parameters: Query: optional filters for chain or asset identifiers.

purpose: Get a quote for a bridge/swap between chains/tokens
parameters: JSON body: from-chain/to-chain identifiers, source/target assets, input amount and destination address (see docs for exact fields).

purpose: Create deposit addresses for bridging funds into Polymarket
parameters: JSON body: target chain/asset and recipient Polymarket wallet, plus optional options (see docs).

purpose: Initiate a withdrawal from Polymarket to another chain/token
parameters: JSON body: withdrawal amount, target chain/asset, destination address, and user identifiers (see docs).

purpose: Get status of deposits/withdrawals associated with a bridge address
parameters: Path: address (deposit or withdrawal address). No body. Returns list of bridge transactions.

purpose: Overall Polymarket status and active incidents
parameters: None (simple GET).

purpose: Status for individual components (Gamma, Data API, CLOB, etc.)
parameters: None (simple GET).

purpose: GraphQL endpoint for on-chain Polymarket data (markets, positions, etc.)
parameters: JSON body: GraphQL fields 'query' (string) and optional 'variables' (object). Requires The Graph API key in URL.
